creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
A few notes:

> +	${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR}

All ${MKDIR} commands should be silenced like they were before.

> +@dir %%DATADIR%%/cab
> +@dir %%DATADIR%%/ctl
> +@dir %%DATADIR%%/fly
> +@dir %%DATADIR%%/ico
> +@dir %%DATADIR%%/man
> +@dir %%DATADIR%%/mrq
> +@dir %%DATADIR%%/pcb
> +@dir %%DATADIR%%/prv
> +@dir %%DATADIR%%/sws
> +@dir %%DATADIR%%/ttl
> +@dir %%DATADIR%%/vdo

Is there a reason for all of these new empty directories?
